control-interactions.interaction:
dRxlHY/OL9cwEhXBpgST9w_ Tab
QgQywK2Z8wY4lX+T2vS7zw_Moves focus to the next element in the tab chain.

pBTY012xWmk5oS9H3jkW5g_ Shift + Tab
1V0+8zxxiiTsER9sM2PT4A_Moves focus to the previous element in the tab chain.

Gil9BGtRg7UEzFZxyCFbjg_ F6
WdnOj/2ZzM7Oq8S2EVnciw_Moves focus to first element of the next UI group (F6 group) in the tab chain.

KLRZxOcusLAjb3sMGlQGXQ_ Shift + F6
ZRVKzKOceHz8CezcP41qDA_Moves focus to first element of the previous UI group (F6 group) in the tab chain.
